# render-catalog

Contributes a `Catalog.FacetTable` tab to the Forge catalog showing all exported symbols aggregated across plugins, with runtime, kind, plugin, and consumer columns.

## Plugin reference

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin exports table in the Forge catalog.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Catalog.FacetTable` "Exports"
